text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest! It's during this
occasion that the academy opens its doors to
fans, somewhat similar to a school festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a rare opportunity to see the students
participating in all kinds of activities outside of
their usual races, so fans gather from all around,
but...

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
More people have shown up than we expected,
and we're having trouble keeping the line in
order.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Send patrol groups C and D to the gate to sort
out the situation there.

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
I've also received reports that some fans are using
flash photography without permission.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Contact the nearest patrol group and send them
out with security to issue warnings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The task of overseeing the Fan Fest activities is
keeping the student council busier than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Air Groove's request, I've pitched in to help
with the event management too, but...

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text: Vice President, bad news!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
One of the students who was going to participate
in the scavenger hunt has come down with a fever!

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
There was a mix-up, and we didn't get word until
just now... I don't think we can find a replacement
in time!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The president will be back shortly. I'll ask her to
take over for me while I enter the scavenger hunt
myself.

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This isn't a lengthy event like the marathon—it
shouldn't take too much of my time. I'll be right
back once I'm done.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you're coming with me. I'll need you to
pass on any messages from the student council.

text_block_list.name: Male Fan A
text_block_list.text: Am I seeing things, or is that Air Groove?!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: I don't believe it! She's joining the scavenger hunt?!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
We would like to make a quick announcement.
There has been a change in the participants of
the scavenger hunt.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Participant number five has dropped out due to
sudden illness. Air Groove will be participating in
her place. Thank you for your understanding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now then... If I'm going to participate at all, I
must give this scavenger hunt my everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kablam!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand the scavenger hunt is underway! Everyone
in the audience, please help the participants out
if they come up to you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Look at Air Groove go! She's the first to reach the
table and secure her card with the items she
needs to find!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (Now, let's see...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, Air Groove is looking quite worried!
Still, she's off toward the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Would anyone here happen to have any of my
merch?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The list in Air Groove's hand reads: "Three items
of your own merch."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is a substitute, so no one was
expecting her to be here. This is bad!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If anyone happens to have any of my merch,
could I please borrow it?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: I do! I have a keychain with you on it!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text: Me too! I have an Empress wristband! Here!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan A
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! I have one of your pins!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all so much. The Empress shall make
the most of your support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove borrows the three pieces of merch and
dashes to the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Wow... She was so incredible I almost forgot to
breathe. I'm so glad I was born in the same era as
her...

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she's glorious! Ahhh, even her hands were
elegant!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That pin is going to be a family heirloom. I'm
putting it in my will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove dashes off and successfully secures
first place in the scavenger hunt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the scavenger hunt, the rest of the Fan Fest
proceeds without issue, and the participants all
leave satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, having run herself ragged as both
manager and participant, takes a moment to
catch her breath.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I have to say, I'm a tad bit worn out.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The same goes for you. Thank you for all your
help.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All in all, I'm happy the event went as well as it
did.
choice_data_list: The scavenger hunt was a bit touch and go.
The scavenger hunt was a bit touch and go.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That it was. I may have been a surprise
contestant, but that didn't mean I could allow
myself to lose.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have those three fans to thank for my victory
though.
choice_data_list:
You'll have to repay them with a stunning
performance in the Takarazuka Kinen.

You'll have to repay them with a stunning
performance in the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Indeed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Air Groove and I raise our glasses of
carrot juice in a toast, celebrating a successful
end to the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I secretly pray that her experience with the fans
today will give her the strength to do her best at
the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text: Me, me, me! I'm your biggest fan! I've got everything! Photos, keychains, pins, phone cases—you name it!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Oh, oh! I've got some accessories! And did you
notice I'm dressed just like you?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Look at me, Air Groove! I've got a hand fan with
your face on it!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Check this out! Empress shirt, Empress towel,
Empress wristband, Empress light stick! I've. Got.
It. All!

text_block_list.name: Various Fans
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! Empress! Air Groovey-Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I didn't think there'd be so many of them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chaos is threatening to unfold!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Silence, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's voice can be heard over the crowd.
All of her fans close their mouths
simultaneously—almost as if they had rehearsed
for this very moment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Now, you there. And you. And the
man over there. Yes, you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I may, I would like to borrow an item from each
of you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The Empress will reward your support by claiming
victory without fail.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Three pieces of merch in hand, Air Groove dashes
off decisively for the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Various Fans
text_block_list.text: Em-press! Em-press! Em-press! Em-press!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amid roaring cheers, Air Groove successfully
crosses the finish line in first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the scavenger hunt, the rest of the Fan Fest
proceeds without issue, and the participants all
leave satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, having run herself ragged as both
manager and participant, takes a moment to
catch her breath.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy to say we've wrapped up the Fan Fest
nicely.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: As did you. Thank you for all your help today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Personally speaking, I found it to be quite a...
sobering event.
choice_data_list: You mean at the scavenger hunt?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It was an enlightening experience seeing with
my own two eyes just how many fans were
watching me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I must be the ideal Empress for them all—now and
forever.
choice_data_list: Let's show them at the Takarazuka Kinen.
Let's show them at the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Indeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Air Groove and I raise our glasses of
carrot juice in a toast, celebrating a successful
end to the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I secretly pray that the support of all her fans will
give her the strength to do her best at the
Takarazuka Kinen.
